BaseField.Name: Label55
BaseField.Text: You may renew your current Forest Practices Application/Notification if:

BaseField.Name: DataField1
BaseField.Text: • You are not proposing to modify the uncompleted operation.

BaseField.Name: Label57
BaseField.Text: • There are no outstanding enforcement actions associated with the application/notification.

BaseField.Name: Label58
BaseField.Text: • The current forest practices rules do not require a change in the nature and extent of the forest practices.

BaseField.Name: Label60
BaseField.Text: • The approved FPA/N was not previously renewed.

BaseField.Name: Label61
BaseField.Text: Submit the completed form with appropriate fees to the DNR region office that is responsible for the geographic areas of the operation.

BaseField.Name: Label63
BaseField.Text: You can find a list of DNR region offices by visiting the DNR website at www.dnr.wa.gov and clicking on Regions.

BaseField.Name: Label62
BaseField.Text: Renewal requests must be received and accepted at the region office prior to the expiration date of your current forest practices application or notification.

BaseField.Name: Label152
BaseField.Text: To upload documentation, select the document type and then select the Upload button below. View documentation by selecting the View Documentation button.

BaseField.Name: Label64
BaseField.Text: Is the landowner a business or an individual?:*

BaseField.Name: Label160
BaseField.Text: Search for a business below to add to your application.

BaseField.Name: Landowner Business Search Postal Zip Code
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: Landowner Business Search Postal Zip Code

BaseField.Name: Landowner Business Instructions lbl
BaseField.Text: Search for a contact below to add ta business signer to your application.

BaseField.Name: Landowner Individual Instructions lbl
BaseField.Text: Search for a contact below to add a landowner to your application.

BaseField.Name: DG Landowners
BaseField.DataFilter: [Contact Information Relation].[Related Record ID] = '{{Form ID}}' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Related Record ID] <> '' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Landowner] = 'True' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Status] <> 'Disabled' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Business Signer] = 'False'

BaseField.Name: DG Landowner Businesses
BaseField.DataFilter: [Contact Information Relation].[Related Record ID] = '{{Form ID}}' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Landowner] = 'True' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Related Record ID] <> '' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Status] <> 'Disabled'

BaseField.Name: DG Landowner Business Signers
BaseField.DataFilter: [Contact Information Relation].[Related Record ID] = '{{Form ID}}' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Related Record ID] <> '' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Landowner] = 'True' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Status] <> 'Disabled' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Business Signer] = 'True'

BaseField.Name: Label217
BaseField.Text: Is the timber owner a business or an individual?:*

BaseField.Name: Label220
BaseField.Text: Search for a business below to add to your application.

BaseField.Name: Timber Owner Business Search Business Name
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: Timber Owner Business Search Business Name

BaseField.Name: Timber Owner Business Search Business ID
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: Timber Owner Business Search Business ID

BaseField.Name: Timber Owner Business Search Postal Zip Code
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: Timber Owner Business Search Postal Zip Code

BaseField.Name: Timber Owner Business Search Address Line 1
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: Timber Owner Business Search Address Line 1

BaseField.Name: Timber Owner Business Search Address Line 2
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: Timber Owner Business Search Address Line 2

BaseField.Name: Timber Owner Business Search Address Line 3
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: Timber Owner Business Search Address Line 3

BaseField.Name: Timber Owner Business Search Province State
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: Timber Owner Business Search Province State

BaseField.Name: Timber Owner business instructions lbl
BaseField.Text: Search for a contact below to add ta business signer to your application.

BaseField.Name: Timber Owner Individual instructions lbl
BaseField.Text: Search for a contact below to add a Timber owner to your application.

BaseField.Name: btnHelpTimberOwnerBusinessSignerSearch
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: Help Timber Owner Business Signer Search

BaseField.Name: Timber Owner Search Postal Zip Code
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: Timber Owner Search Postal Zip Code

BaseField.Name: DG Timber Owners
BaseField.DataFilter: [Contact Information Relation].[Related Record ID] = '{{Form ID}}' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Related Record ID] <> '' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Timber Owner] = 'True' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Status] <> 'Disabled' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Business Signer] = 'False'

BaseField.Name: DG Timber Owner Businesses
BaseField.DataFilter: [Contact Information Relation].[Related Record ID] = '{{Form ID}}' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Timber Owner] = 'True' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Related Record ID] <> '' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Status] <> 'Disabled'

BaseField.Name: DG Timber Owner Business Signers
BaseField.DataFilter: [Contact Information Relation].[Related Record ID] = '{{Form ID}}' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Related Record ID] <> '' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Timber Owner] = 'True' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Status] <> 'Disabled' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Business Signer] = 'True'

BaseField.Name: Label282
BaseField.Text: Is the Operator a business or an individual?:*

BaseField.Name: DataField10
BaseField.Text: Search for a business below to add to your application.

BaseField.Name: Operator Business Search Business ID Number
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: Operator Business Search Business ID Number

BaseField.Name: Operator Business Search Postal Zip Code
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: Operator Business Search Postal Zip Code

BaseField.Name: Operator Business Instructions lbl
BaseField.Text: Search for a contact below to add ta business signer to your application.

BaseField.Name: Operator Individual Instructions lbl
BaseField.Text: Search for a contact below to add an Operator to your application.

BaseField.Name: DG Operators
BaseField.DataFilter: [Contact Information Relation].[Related Record ID] = '{{Form ID}}' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Related Record ID] <> '' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Operator] = 'True' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Status] <> 'Disabled' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Business Signer] = 'False'

BaseField.Name: DG Operator Businesses
BaseField.DataFilter: [Contact Information Relation].[Related Record ID] = '{{Form ID}}' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Operator] = 'True' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Related Record ID] <> '' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Status] <> 'Disabled'

BaseField.Name: DG Operator Business Signers
BaseField.DataFilter: [Contact Information Relation].[Related Record ID] = '{{Form ID}}' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Related Record ID] <> '' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Operator] = 'True' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Status] <> 'Disabled' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Business Signer] = 'True'

BaseField.Name: First Name Contact Person
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: First Name Contact Person required field

BaseField.Name: Last Name Contact Person
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: Last Name Contact Person required field

BaseField.Name: DataField16
BaseField.Text: 2. Are you proposing any modifications to the original approved forest practices?*

BaseField.Name: Label287
BaseField.Text: Are you proposing any modifications to the original approved forest practices?*

BaseField.Name: btnHelpProposingModifications
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: Quick Help: Help for proposing modifications

BaseField.Name: Label68
BaseField.Text: If yes, the approved FPA/N is not eligible for renewal and you must complete a new Forest Practice Application/Notification form.

BaseField.Name: DataField17
BaseField.Text: 3. Are you small forest landowner per RCW 76.09.450? See FPA/N instructions for details.*

BaseField.Name: Label67
BaseField.Text: Are you a small forest landowner per RCW 76.09.450?*

BaseField.Name: btnHelpSmallForestLandowner
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: Quick Help: Help for small forest landowner

BaseField.Name: DataField18
BaseField.Text: 4. Is entire proposed harvest on a singles contiguous ownership consisting of one or more parcels?*

BaseField.Name: DataField19
BaseField.Text: Is entire proposed harvest on a singles contiguous ownership consisting of one or more parcels?*

BaseField.Name: btnHelpEntireProposedHarvest
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: Quick Help: Entire proposed harvest on a singles contiguous ownership

BaseField.Name: Label69
BaseField.Text: 5. What is the legal description of your forest practices?*

BaseField.Name: DG Legal Description
BaseField.DataFilter: [Related Record ID] = '{{Related Record ID}}' AND [Related Record ID] <> '' AND [Status] <> 'Disabled'

BaseField.Name: Does Not Require Payment
BaseField.Text: My application does not require payment for one of the following reasons:

BaseField.Name: Label323
BaseField.Text: • 45-Day Resubmittal of a Withdrawn or Disapproved FPA/N:

BaseField.Name: Label298
BaseField.Text: • The information on this application/notification is true.

BaseField.Name: Label297
BaseField.Text:
• I/We understand this proposed forest practice is subject to:
    • The Forest Practices Act and Rules, AND
    • All other federal, state or local regulations.

BaseField.Name: Label299
BaseField.Text: • Compliance with the Forest Practices Act and Rules does not ensure compliance with the Endangered Species Act or other federal, state or local laws.

BaseField.Name: Label304
BaseField.Text: The landowner understands that by signing and submitting this FPA/N Renewal they are authorizing the Deparment of Natural Resources to enter the property in order to review the proposal, inspect harvest operations, and monitor compliance for up to three years after its expiration date. RCW 76.09.150

BaseField.Name: Label290
BaseField.Text: Prior to submittal, the proponent must include evidence for when a "Perpetual Timber Rights Owner" is signing on behalf of the landowner. See WAC 222-20-010(4)

BaseField.Name: DG Signatures
BaseField.DataFilter: [Contact Information Relation].[Related Record ID] = '{{Form ID}}' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Related Record ID] <> '' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Status] <> 'Disabled'

BaseField.Name: DG Fees
BaseField.DataFilter: [Related Record ID] = '{{Form ID}}' AND [Related Record ID] <> '' AND ([Status] = 'Unpaid' OR [Status] = 'Paid')

BaseField.Name: Label317
BaseField.Text: You can manage your submitted application by selecting one of the following actions.

BaseField.Name: Label319
BaseField.Text: • Withdrawal Request: Request to withdraw or close your application.

BaseField.Name: Label43
BaseField.Text: Instructions: This section is only visible to VaultAccess users. Check Administrator Override to remove read-only configurations and show all fields. Select Admin Save to save any changes without applying business rules. Remember to uncheck override and save before closing.

Group.GroupName: Show Fees Tab Finance Editor Buttons
Show Fees Tab Pay Now Button
Show Landowner Business Signer or Individual
Show Operator Business Signer or Individual
Show Q6 Not Req Pay Reasons
Show Timber Owner Business Signer or Individual

SetButtonVisibility
AddLandownerContactModal
printPDF
FormScriptItem.Script:
const destinationURL = `${VV.BaseURL}ReportViewer?rpid=9c48546d-9431-f011-82d4-c3102142a75d&formId=${VV.Form.DhDocID}`;
window.open(destinationURL, "_blank");
